title: FOOGO Green 100pcs 12oz Disposable Strong Single-Wall White Paper Coffee Cups, FSC® Certified, Fully Compostable, Takeaway, Paper Cups for Hot Drinks, Parties, Eco-Friendly
features: HEAT and COLD RESISTANT paper cups - These simple white coffee cups are made from high quality paper, making them highly resistant to heat and cold. Our disposable cups are perfect not only for serving hot or cold drinks in cafes and restaurants but also for use at home.

Our coffee cups are FSC CERTIFIED and made from paper that is sourced in a socially and environmentally responsible manner. As a brand, we are committed to ensuring healthy, resilient forests for all.
SECURE LEAK-PROOF lids are available to purchase separately. The lids are designed to fit the cups perfectly, avoiding leaks and spills when on the go or driving in a car.
PREMIUM QUALITY and STURDY - The thick-wall structure ensures shape retention even after multiple refills. The matt finish outer wall offers an ergonomic grip for the fast-paced to-go days.
ECO-FRIENDLY and COMPOSTABLE - The cups are fully compostable in 4 weeks under the right conditions.

FOOGO Green Premium FSC® Certified Paper Cups Merchant video A greener alternative. Perfect for Cafés, Restaurants & Home Use Serve your customers or guests with confidence. FOOGO Green paper coffee cups offer a clean, minimalist look that fits seamlessly into any café, restaurant, or home kitchen. Durable, elegant, and kind to the planet — these cups are the sustainable choice for modern living. Better for You. Better for the Planet. At FOOGO Green, we’re committed to sustainability from start to finish. Our cups are made from FSC Certified paper , ensuring responsible forestry and reduced waste. By choosing FOOGO Green disposable cups , you’re supporting eco-conscious practices and helping to build a cleaner, greener future. What is the material of the cups? The cups are made from FSC certified high-quality paper sourced responsibly, ensuring sustainable forest management. Are these cups sturdy and good quality? FOOGO Green cups have a thick-wall construction that ensures shape retention even after multiple refills, with a matte finish outer wall for an ergonomic grip. Are the cups leak-proof? Our coffee cups are made from strong, high-quality paper and are carefully designed to prevent leaks. For added security and convenience, we also offer matching secure lids that can be purchased separately. Can these cups be used for both hot and cold drinks? Absolutely. These cups are designed to be heat and cold resistant, suitable for serving hot coffee or cold beverages, ideal for cafes, restaurants, or home use. Can the cups be reused? These FOOGO Green cups are designed primarily for single use, but they are made with sturdy materials that many customers find suitable for multiple uses before recycling.
